Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

About the Faculty

MENU

Vision

The Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences aims to be a leading faculty in business world integration, through educating innovative entrepreneurs and competent professionals with and for the business world.

Mission

The Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences; with its dynamic and interdisciplinary approach, prepare students with human rights and freedom consciousness for careers in the practice of business and management by maintaining a leading faculty that fosters the creation and dissemination of knowledge in a changing global business world. Moreover, we support our graduates to be innovative entrepreneurs and competent professionals with “learning to learn” abilities.
